testcase.name: test_generate_positioning_creates_ai_output
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_driven_posizionamento_masterclass.py:113: in test_generate_positioning_creates_ai_output assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"Errore generazione posizionamento: No module named 'anthropic'"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_approve_positioning_marks_complete
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_driven_posizionamento_masterclass.py:145: in test_approve_positioning_marks_complete assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 400: {"detail":"Nessun posizionamento da approvare"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_generate_script_returns_sections
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_driven_posizionamento_masterclass.py:224: in test_generate_script_returns_sections assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"Errore generazione script: No module named 'anthropic'"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_posizionamento_generate_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 500 assert 500 in [200, 400] + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_driven_posizionamento_masterclass.py:338: in test_posizionamento_generate_endpoint assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 500 E assert 500 in [200, 400] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
